mass.name: total system mass
mass.description: Input: Total system mass wet including margins

m_dry_nomargin.name: total dry mass
m_dry_nomargin.description: total dry mass including all margins

m_margin.name: total margin mass
m_margin.description: total mass of all margins. based on statistics.

m_propellant.name: total propellant mass
m_propellant.description: propellant mass calculated by tsiolkosvky of inputs

m_payload.name: total payload mass
m_payload.description: total payload mass. based on statistics.

m_structure.name: total structural mass
m_structure.description: total structural mass. based on statistics.

m_thermal.name: total thermal system mass
m_thermal.description: total thermal system mass. based on statistics.

m_power.name: total power system mass
m_power.description: total power system mass. based on statistics.

m_ttc.name: total ttc mass
m_ttc.description: total telemetry, tracking and control system mass. based on statistics.

m_adc.name: total adc mass
m_adc.description: total attitude determination and control system mass. based on statistics.

m_propulsion.name: total propulsion system mass
m_propulsion.description: total propulsion system mass. based on statistics, refined by additional modelling.

m_misc.name: total miscellaneous mass
m_misc.description: accounting for other minor masses, could be considered additional margin.

mass_fractions.name: Subsystem mass fractions
mass_fractions.description: Ratios of all subsystem masses in relation to the total system mass

frac_m_dry_nomargin.name: total dry mass fraction
frac_m_dry_nomargin.description: total dry mass including all margins to total mass fraction

frac_m_margin.name: total margin mass fraction
frac_m_margin.description: total mass of all margins to total mass fraction

frac_m_dry_margin.name: total marginless dry mass fraction
frac_m_dry_margin.description: total dry mass without margin to total mass fraction

frac_m_propellant.name: total propellant mass fraction
frac_m_propellant.description: propellant mass to total mass fraction

frac_m_payload.name: total payload mass fraction
frac_m_payload.description: total payload mass to total mass fraction

frac_m_structure.name: total structural mass fraction
frac_m_structure.description: total structural mass to total mass fraction

frac_m_thermal.name: total thermal system mass fraction
frac_m_thermal.description: total thermal system mass to total mass fraction

frac_m_power.name: total power system mass fraction
frac_m_power.description: total power system mass to total mass fraction

frac_m_ttc.name: total ttc mass fraction
frac_m_ttc.description: total telemetry, tracking and control system mass to total mass fraction

frac_m_adc.name: total adc mass fraction
frac_m_adc.description: total attitude determination and control system mass to total mass fraction

frac_m_propulsion.name: total propulsion system mass fraction
frac_m_propulsion.description: total propulsion system mass to total mass fraction

dv.name: delta v
dv.description: Input: Total velocity increment of the mission

power_propulsion.name: Propulsion system power
power_propulsion.description: Input: Total propulsion system electric power

power_jet.name: Jet exhaust power
power_jet.description: Total jet output power of the propulsion system

power_thruster.name: Thruster power
power_thruster.description: Total electric power consumption of the propulsion system

propellant.name: Propellant
propellant.description: Describes the current propellant used by the propulsion system

c_e.name: Effective exhaust velocity
c_e.description: Effective exhaust velocity of the propulsion system

eff_PPU.name: PPU efficiency
eff_PPU.description: Power conversion efficiency of the Power Propulsion Unit (PPU)

eff_thruster.name: Thruster efficiency
eff_thruster.description: El. power to jet power conversion efficiency of the thruster

maneuver_duration.name: Total maneuvre duration
maneuver_duration.description: Total time to perform the full dv of all maneuvres.

evolution_success.name: Flag for Evolution sucess
evolution_success.description: Flags the sucess of the recent generation. Relevant for algorithm analysis and debugging.

n_success.name: Success counter
n_success.description: Counter for convergence of lineage. Relevant for algorithm analysis and debugging.
